body: Prioritizing this for the beta cut. Megan, can you scope the index change by Friday? Pilot latency is the #1 complaint right now.
Funnel data confirms the 22% drop at email verify. Closing once the new flow is live — nice work.
Dark mode is a hard requirement for two of the three pilots. Tomoko owns the tokens; I'll keep this on the Northstar board.
Triage got a lot faster after the structured logging switch. Thanks for pushing this through before the freeze.
Empty state should nudge them to connect a data source, not just show a blank panel. Adding the copy to the spec.
Stale reports burned us last sprint. Health check + alert is non-negotiable before we widen the beta.
Security flagged this one. Bumping it ahead of the feature work — patch first, then we resume.
Let's start the canary at 5% and watch the 5xx rate for an hour before ramping. I'll coordinate with on-call.
Runbook looks solid. One ask: add the rollback decision tree at the top so on-call doesn't have to scroll.
Retention numbers can't disagree across surfaces — pilots will notice. Ryan, let's lock the metric definition this week.
Mobile picker feedback came straight from the pilot calls. Shipped redesign tests well — closing.
Cursor pagination unblocks the largest pilot account. Can we get this reviewed before the freeze window?
Export timeouts are a recurring support ticket. Streaming the response is the right call — keeping this on the beta list.
A/B results are in: checklist variant lifted activation 8.4%. Rolling to 100%. Thanks Ryan.
Peak-hour 503s hit a pilot during a demo. This needs to stay closed for good — adding a load test to CI.
Contrast fails block the accessibility sign-off for the pilot review. Tomoko, can we land the palette fix this sprint?
Arcadia flagged the slow cold start on yesterday's call. Megan, can you profile the initial paint this week? Let's prefetch the default range before we touch anything else.
The workspace-naming step is the biggest single drop in onboarding. Inline default tested well — let's ship it and close this out.
Clipped legends showed up in Meridian Health's screenshots. Tomoko, let's get the responsive legend tokens in before the pilot review — keeping this on the Northstar board.
Shared request ids across the export path cut our last export-failure investigation from an hour to minutes. Great cleanup ahead of the freeze.
Prioritizing this for the beta cut. Pilot latency is the #1 complaint right now.
Can we scope the index change by Friday? Blocking the pilot widen.
This looks good to merge once CI is green. Nice work on the streaming export.
Let's not overbuild v1 — templated digests only, no custom SQL.
Repointing the exec dashboard to the WAA query in this PR. Please review the migration.
Confirmed the Safari step-3 fix resolves the funnel gap. Thanks for the fast turnaround.
Rolling this to fast-follow, it's not a freeze blocker.
Adding a kill criterion to the experiment before we ship the flag.
The empty-state sample dataset is the activation lever. Keep it lightweight.
Runbook LGTM. Link it from the on-call channel topic.
Deprecating the old event names end of sprint. Update the tracking plan.
Dark-mode contrast fix verified against AA. Merging.
Can eng give a realistic estimate on the report exporter? Want it right, not rushed.
Saved-views persistence bug is reproduced. Fix is in this branch.
Great review comments, folding them in. Second pass incoming.
